text: Good morning! Can you pull up today's calendar and reminders?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Saturday, November 23. No work meetings today. You have Ethan's soccer practice scheduled and neighborhood BBQ at Dave's place.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Hey Jarvis, Enjoying a cold beer on the deck. Trying to unwind after a stressful day. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Logged that. Relaxation mode active. Reading is a great way to disconnect. I've set a quiet sleep timer. I'll silence any notification logs.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: We got invited to a neighbor's house. Sarah and Kim are organizing the Memorial block party. Looking forward to the weekend.
title: Social Update

text: Sure thing! Catan is always a good time. Great neighborhood event. I can help organize the signup sheets. Have a great time!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick log: Ethan is practicing his piano lessons in the living room. We need to pack his shin guards and water bottle for practice. The kids are staying active.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Sounds exciting! I've set a reminder so you have plenty of time for practice pickup. Let's make sure we have their gear packed.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick update: The kitchen sink area has a problem. The HVAC has been running constantly and upstairs is warm. Always something to fix.
title: Household Update

text: Let's get that resolved. A clogged HVAC filter reduces airflow. I'll note it on our maintenance log. I'll update the home maintenance log.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Jarvis, Writing scripts to process image datasets. I quantized a local LLM to run in memory. Lost track of time, it's 2 AM now.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Your hyperfocus projects are impressive. Quantizing 70B models is heavy coding. I've saved settings in your scratchpad. I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Jarvis, Sarah is planning a playdate for Ethan. Cooper had a small accident on the living room rug during crate training. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. Toddlers are full of energy. Puppy training takes patience. Try using positive reinforcement and regular outdoor breaks. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Putting together our grocery list. Grilling steaks and chicken on the deck tonight. It helps to plan ahead.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Understood. Yum, that sounds delicious! Perfect grilling weather! I've added hickory chips to the Costco list. Let me know how the recipe turns out.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick log: Reading a new book before bed. Trying to unwind after a stressful day. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Sure thing! Relaxation mode active. Reading is a great way to disconnect. I've set a quiet sleep timer. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick log: We got invited to a neighbor's house. Dave Nguyen invited us for a backyard BBQ. We need to do this more often.
title: Social Update

text: I've noted the plans. Fun! Dave loves IPAs. I can recommend some local microbreweries. Enjoy the craft beer!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick log: We went to the Frisco Aquatic Center today. Lily's gymnastics class signup opens online tomorrow. Feeling good about their progress.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Interesting. Sounds exciting! I've added the signup time to your alerts so you can secure a spot. Would you like me to update the family calendar?
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Hey Jarvis, The smart-home hub is acting up today. The living room lights aren't responding to commands. Glad I caught it early.
title: Household Update

text: Interesting. Good call on checking that. The smart-home bridge needs a manual power cycle. Unplug it for 10 seconds. Let me know if you need any replacement parts ordered.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Jarvis, Researching rover power systems in depth. Lights will pulse red for X-class solar flares. Really satisfying to build this myself.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Your hyperfocus projects are impressive. Connected NOAA weather APIs to your lights. Neat space coding hack, Mike! Let me know if you want to run testing scripts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: We brought our new golden retriever puppy, Cooper, home today. We discussed positive discipline strategies for toddler tantrums. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. Toddlers are full of energy. Consistency is key. Establishing clear, warm boundaries is highly effective. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick log: Putting together our grocery list. We want to try a new vegetarian chili recipe. That should cover us for the week.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Sure thing! Healthy choices are great. Great healthy option. I've added beans and canned tomatoes to the list. Should I check our pantry stock for that?
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Time to log today's thoughts, Jarvis. Relaxing Sunday spending time with Sarah and the kids. Barbecue went well and everyone liked the dinner. Got some yard work done and cleaned up. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal summary recorded. Have a peaceful night.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
